### [Radomes](/radomes)
Precision-built, RF-transparent enclosures built to protect and perform in the harshest conditions.
*   Radome systems supporting an Australian counter-drone security organization

items.notes: Composite radomes, enclosures, panels, marine foils — structural composite parts. Radomes explicitly supplied to an Australian counter-drone security org.

products_categories.notes: CCI is primarily a composites fabricator. UXV-adjacent products are radomes (composite RF-transparent enclosures) supplied to a counter-drone security organization, plus communication shelters. No drone airframe components explicitly sold.

evidence.snippet:
Since 2002, Competition Composites Inc. (CCI) has been serving the global sailing and composites communities with precision-built components and reliable service.
What began as **_Phil’s Foils_**, crafting high-performance marine products, has grown into a full-service composite fabrication facility offering design, tooling, and manufacturing across a wide range of applications.
*   Radome systems supporting an Australian counter-drone security organization

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primarily a composites fabricator serving marine, defense, and industrial sectors. One active program supplies radomes to an Australian counter-drone security organization, but CCI has no UXV-specific product line.

### **Dix Design DidiMini Rudder**
If you’re building a Didi Mini (MiniTransat 6.5) you’ll want to get your foils from Phil. Shown here is the rudder – you’ll need two!

Hampton One Design
==================
Aug 18
Written By [Emry](/shop-rudders?author=5ccba67795f4210001a0cf5f)
This design came from a Hampton One Design fleet member who sent me his own laminated blank for milling. We’ve built a few more since that first one.

### **Dix Design Didi26 Keel**
The Didi26 keel core is one large piece of laminated timber! You don’t really want to shape that yourself, do you? Let our CNC do it for you.
